error_message: Admin chrome shown on localized /en/admin URLs; footer category labels stuck in Portuguese; OAuth callback logged userId
root_cause: Paraglide prefixes non-base locales but isAdmin compared raw pathname; category names came from static CATEGORIES; oauth used console.log
approach: Use deLocalizeHref for isAdmin; segment-based admin guard; localizeHref on admin URLs; Paraglide keys; structured logger; deleteSession on logout
prevention_details: 404 for unknown category slug; OAuth browser-only comments in google-oauth-browser.ts and login server
commit_message: fix(i18n-auth): locale-aware admin routing, translations, OAuth logging
follow_ups: Lint rule for raw console.log in routes; CI i18n key parity check
